description: Membangun SKYPAY (sistem billing ISP & manajemen perangkat), mengembangkan sistem voucher WiFi terintegrasi Mikrotik, mengintegrasikan payment gateway Tripay, mengelola otomasi perangkat (Router, ONT, OLT), dan memimpin pengembangan software internal termasuk SaaS management tools.
descriptionEn: Built SKYPAY (ISP billing & device management system), developed WiFi voucher system integrated with Mikrotik, integrated Tripay payment gateway, managed device automation (Router, ONT, OLT), and led internal software development including SaaS management tools.

description: Mengembangkan sistem CRM dengan JWT Authentication dan membangun aplikasi web internal perusahaan.
descriptionEn: Developed CRM system with JWT Authentication and built internal company web applications.

description: Merancang infrastruktur LAN kantor, membangun sistem administrasi kenotariatan, dan memelihara sistem hardware & jaringan.
descriptionEn: Designed office LAN infrastructure, built notary administration system, and maintained hardware & networking systems.
